__comment: Tailscale Serve config (plan 006 Phase 4): serves the backend at https://<hostname>.<tailnet>.ts.net to TAILNET DEVICES ONLY. ${TS_CERT_DOMAIN} is substituted by the container at start. To expose PUBLICLY via Funnel (deliberate escalation), add  "AllowFunnel": { "${TS_CERT_DOMAIN}:443": true }  at the top level.
